narrative:
Clyde-Green Springs Ex Vill Sd (Sandusky) exempted village school district has 7,985 registered voters, with 55.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.6 percentage points.
